style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fillColor=#FAFAFA;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" value="<b>Legende</b><br/>— Bleu plein : flux HTTPS / ALB<br/>— Rouge pointille : SSH ProxyJump (Bastion)<br/>— Vert : deploiement Ansible (playbook)<br/>— Orange : acces S3 (s3 sync / put/get)<br/>— Violet pointille : scraping Prometheus :9100<br/>— Gris pointille : trafic sortant via NAT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="380" x="60" y="975" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="secNote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fillColor=#FAFAFA;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;rounded=1;fontSize=10;" value="<b>Securite</b><br/>• Acces internet : ALB (HTTPS) + Bastion (SSH) uniquement<br/>• Webs / FTP / Monitoring : aucun port expose sur internet<br/>• S3 : acces public bloque, chiffrement KMS-CMK, versioning<br/>• Mot de passe FTP genere par Terraform (random_password)<br/>• Hardening Ansible : root SSH desactive, cle SSH uniquement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="510" x="480" y="975" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 980px; margin-left: 40px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
Legende
— Bleu plein : flux HTTPS / ALB
— Rouge pointille : SSH ProxyJump (Bastion)
— Vert : deploiement Ansible (playbook)
— Orange : acces S3 (s3 sync / put/get)
— Violet pointille : scraping Prometheus :9100
— Gris pointille : trafic sortant via NAT

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(189, 189, 189), rgb(75, 75, 75));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 980px; margin-left: 460px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
Securite
• Acces internet : ALB (HTTPS) + Bastion (SSH) uniquement
• Webs / FTP / Monitoring : aucun port expose sur internet
• S3 : acces public bloque, chiffrement KMS-CMK, versioning
• Mot de passe FTP genere par Terraform (random_password)
• Hardening Ansible : root SSH desactive, cle SSH uniquement
